title: Help Desk - Browser Troubleshooting
body: Clear your browser cache and cookies using instructions in Clearing Browser Cache and Cookies . Try using another browser if possible, such as Chrome, Firefox, or Safari: Download Chrome: https://www.google.com/chrome/ Update Safari: https://support.apple.com/downloads/safari Download Firefox: https://www.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/new/ Try using the browser's private (incognito) mode: Chrome: https://support.google.com/chrome/answer/95464 Safari: https://support.apple.com/guide/safari/use-private-browsing-ibrw1069/mac Firefox: https://support.mozilla.org/en-US/kb/private-browsing-use-firefox-without-history Check for browser updates: Chrome: https://support.google.com/chrome/answer/95414 Safari: https://support.apple.com/en-us/HT204416 Firefox: https://support.mozilla.org/en-US/kb/find-what-version-firefox-you-are-using See Also Opening a Private Browsing Window
